recommendations.title: The Knock Out Cop
recommendations.overview: Inspector “Flatfoot” Rizzo investigates crime and corruption in Naples.

recommendations.title: Flatfoot in Egypt
recommendations.overview: Inspector Rizzo and Marshal Caputo go to Egypt and look for Professor Cerullo, who is missing.

recommendations.title: An American in Rome
recommendations.overview: Nando Moriconi is a young Italian living in Rome obsessed with all-things American.

recommendations.title: Flatfoot in Africa
recommendations.overview: Inspector Rizzo in Napoli gets a message from a policeman from South Africa who wants to meet him. Immediately before this meeting the South African policeman is killed. Dying he shows Rizzo a picture of his young son Bodo. Rizzo travels to Johannesb

recommendations.title: Horse Fever
recommendations.overview: Bruno Fioretti, known as "Mandrake", is an inveterate gambler who never misses a day at the horse racing track in Rome. He is doubly unlucky: he bets too much on one horse, and his wife is sleeping with his best friend because Mandrake is always at t

recommendations.title: The Overtaxed
recommendations.overview: Mr. Pezzella owns and operates a well-established luxury-clothing store. He does not like and does not consider it right to pay taxes and therefore uses a tax consultant to be able to evade more taxes.

recommendations.title: Cops and Robbers
recommendations.overview: Esposito is a thief who cons tourists in Rome. Officer Bottoni manages to catch him and starts persecuting him. When Esposito manages to flee, Bottoni's superiors inform him that he'll lose his job if he can't catch Esposito.

recommendations.title: Banana Joe
recommendations.overview: Island farmer Banana Joe helps the local community by trading his bananas for goods. When gangsters arrive with plans to construct a banana processing plant, Joe kicks them out, but the mob boss discovers that Joe is operating without a license. Afte

recommendations.title: The Guard
recommendations.overview: When a small-town Irish cop with a crass personality is partnered with a straight-laced FBI agent to bust an international drug-trafficking ring, they must settle their differences in order to take down a dangerous gang.

recommendations.title: The Street Fighter
recommendations.overview: Takuma Tsurugi takes on the government, the police, the mafia and an international ring of kidnappers who aim to dispossess a beautiful young heiress of her millions.
